mapper.sql: select w.warning_id, w.warning_type, w.object_type, w.object_id, w.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.province as dept_province, d.city as dept_city, d.area as dept_area, w.source_dept_id, sd.dept_name as source_dept_name, w.fire_point_id, fp.fire_point_name, w.gateway_id, g.imei as gateway_imei, w.sensor_id, s.sensor_code, w.extinguisher_id, e.label_code as extinguisher_label_code, e.product_name as extinguisher_product_name, w.trigger_time, w.last_trigger_time, w.window_start_time, w.window_end_time, w.sample_count, w.threshold_snapshot, w.evidence_summary, w.warning_status, w.confirm_by, w.confirm_time, w.handle_by, w.handle_time, w.resolve_by, w.resolve_time, w.false_alarm_reason, w.remark, w.create_by, w.create_time, w.update_by, w.update_time, w.del_flag from fe_device_warning w left join sys_dept d on w.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_dept sd on w.source_dept_id = sd.dept_id left join fe_fire_point fp on w.fire_point_id = fp.fire_point_id left join fe_gateway g on w.gateway_id = g.gateway_id left join fe_sensor s on w.sensor_id = s.sensor_id left join fe_extinguisher e on w.extinguisher_id = e.extinguisher_id

select sensor_id, min(extinguisher_id) as extinguisher_id, min(dept_id) as dept_id, min(source_dept_id) as source_dept_id, min(fire_point_id) as fire_point_id from fe_extinguisher where del_flag is null or del_flag = '0' group by sensor_id
mapper.select:
select count(1) from fe_device_warning w
w.del_flag = '0' and w.warning_status in ('pending', 'processing') ${params.dataScope}

select count(1) from fe_device_warning w
w.del_flag = '0' and w.warning_status in ('pending', 'processing') and w.warning_type = 'suspected_fire' ${params.dataScope}

w.del_flag = '0' and w.warning_status in ('pending', 'processing') ${params.dataScope}
order by w.last_trigger_time desc, w.warning_id desc limit 5

select 'suspected_fire' as warning_type, 'sensor' as object_type, h.sensor_id as object_id, coalesce(s.dept_id, e.dept_id) as dept_id, coalesce(s.source_dept_id, e.source_dept_id) as source_dept_id, coalesce(g.fire_point_id, e.fire_point_id) as fire_point_id, s.gateway_id, h.sensor_id, e.extinguisher_id, h.create_time as trigger_time, h.create_time as last_trigger_time, h.create_time as window_start_time, h.create_time as window_end_time, 1 as sample_count, 'temperature between 70 and 200' as threshold_snapshot, concat('sensor=', coalesce(s.sensor_code, h.sensor_code, h.sensor_id), ', temperature=', h.temperature, ', sample_time=', date_format(h.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) as evidence_summary, 'pending' as warning_status from fe_sensor_history h left join fe_sensor s on h.sensor_id = s.sensor_id left join fe_gateway g on s.gateway_id = g.gateway_id left join () e on e.sensor_id = h.sensor_id where h.temperature >= 70 and h.temperature <= 200 and h.sensor_id is not null and h.create_time is not null and coalesce(s.source_dept_id, e.source_dept_id) = #{sourceDeptId} and not exists ( select 1 from fe_sensor_history h2 where h2.sensor_id = h.sensor_id and h2.temperature >= 70 and h2.temperature <= 200 and h2.create_time is not null and ( h2.create_time > h.create_time or (h2.create_time = h.create_time and h2.history_id > h.history_id) ) )

select 'low_battery' as warning_type, 'sensor' as object_type, s.sensor_id as object_id, coalesce(s.dept_id, e.dept_id) as dept_id, coalesce(s.source_dept_id, e.source_dept_id) as source_dept_id, coalesce(g.fire_point_id, e.fire_point_id) as fire_point_id, s.gateway_id, s.sensor_id, e.extinguisher_id, latest.window_end_time as trigger_time, latest.window_end_time as last_trigger_time, latest.window_start_time, latest.window_end_time, latest.sample_count, 'battery_level <= 20, consecutive=3' as threshold_snapshot, concat('sensor=', coalesce(s.sensor_code, s.sensor_id), ', samples=', latest.samples) as evidence_summary, 'pending' as warning_status from fe_sensor s left join fe_gateway g on s.gateway_id = g.gateway_id left join () e on e.sensor_id = s.sensor_id join ( select x.sensor_id, min(x.create_time) as window_start_time, max(x.create_time) as window_end_time, count(1) as sample_count, sum(case when x.battery_level <= 20 then 1 else 0 end) as abnormal_count, group_concat(concat(x.battery_level, '% @ ', date_format(x.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) order by x.create_time separator '; ') as samples from fe_sensor_history x where x.battery_level is not null and x.create_time is not null and ( select count(1) from fe_sensor_history y where y.sensor_id = x.sensor_id and y.battery_level is not null and y.create_time is not null and (y.create_time > x.create_time or (y.create_time = x.create_time and y.history_id > x.history_id)) ) < 3 group by x.sensor_id having sample_count = 3 and abnormal_count = 3 ) latest on latest.sensor_id = s.sensor_id where (s.del_flag is null or s.del_flag = '0') and coalesce(s.source_dept_id, e.source_dept_id) = #{sourceDeptId}

select 'low_pressure' as warning_type, 'sensor' as object_type, s.sensor_id as object_id, coalesce(s.dept_id, e.dept_id) as dept_id, coalesce(s.source_dept_id, e.source_dept_id) as source_dept_id, coalesce(g.fire_point_id, e.fire_point_id) as fire_point_id, s.gateway_id, s.sensor_id, e.extinguisher_id, latest.window_end_time as trigger_time, latest.window_end_time as last_trigger_time, latest.window_start_time, latest.window_end_time, latest.sample_count, 'pressure < 1000, valid_range=0..2000, consecutive=3' as threshold_snapshot, concat('sensor=', coalesce(s.sensor_code, s.sensor_id), ', samples=', latest.samples) as evidence_summary, 'pending' as warning_status from fe_sensor s left join fe_gateway g on s.gateway_id = g.gateway_id left join () e on e.sensor_id = s.sensor_id join ( select x.sensor_id, min(x.create_time) as window_start_time, max(x.create_time) as window_end_time, count(1) as sample_count, sum(case when x.pressure < 1000 then 1 else 0 end) as abnormal_count, group_concat(concat(x.pressure, ' @ ', date_format(x.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) order by x.create_time separator '; ') as samples from fe_sensor_history x where x.pressure is not null and x.pressure >= 0 and x.pressure <= 2000 and x.create_time is not null and ( select count(1) from fe_sensor_history y where y.sensor_id = x.sensor_id and y.pressure is not null and y.pressure >= 0 and y.pressure <= 2000 and y.create_time is not null and (y.create_time > x.create_time or (y.create_time = x.create_time and y.history_id > x.history_id)) ) < 3 group by x.sensor_id having sample_count = 3 and abnormal_count = 3 ) latest on latest.sensor_id = s.sensor_id where (s.del_flag is null or s.del_flag = '0') and coalesce(s.source_dept_id, e.source_dept_id) = #{sourceDeptId}

select 'high_pressure' as warning_type, 'sensor' as object_type, s.sensor_id as object_id, coalesce(s.dept_id, e.dept_id) as dept_id, coalesce(s.source_dept_id, e.source_dept_id) as source_dept_id, coalesce(g.fire_point_id, e.fire_point_id) as fire_point_id, s.gateway_id, s.sensor_id, e.extinguisher_id, latest.window_end_time as trigger_time, latest.window_end_time as last_trigger_time, latest.window_start_time, latest.window_end_time, latest.sample_count, 'pressure > 1400, valid_range=0..2000, consecutive=3' as threshold_snapshot, concat('sensor=', coalesce(s.sensor_code, s.sensor_id), ', samples=', latest.samples) as evidence_summary, 'pending' as warning_status from fe_sensor s left join fe_gateway g on s.gateway_id = g.gateway_id left join () e on e.sensor_id = s.sensor_id join ( select x.sensor_id, min(x.create_time) as window_start_time, max(x.create_time) as window_end_time, count(1) as sample_count, sum(case when x.pressure > 1400 then 1 else 0 end) as abnormal_count, group_concat(concat(x.pressure, ' @ ', date_format(x.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) order by x.create_time separator '; ') as samples from fe_sensor_history x where x.pressure is not null and x.pressure >= 0 and x.pressure <= 2000 and x.create_time is not null and ( select count(1) from fe_sensor_history y where y.sensor_id = x.sensor_id and y.pressure is not null and y.pressure >= 0 and y.pressure <= 2000 and y.create_time is not null and (y.create_time > x.create_time or (y.create_time = x.create_time and y.history_id > x.history_id)) ) < 3 group by x.sensor_id having sample_count = 3 and abnormal_count = 3 ) latest on latest.sensor_id = s.sensor_id where (s.del_flag is null or s.del_flag = '0') and coalesce(s.source_dept_id, e.source_dept_id) = #{sourceDeptId}

select 'insufficient_extinguisher' as warning_type, 'fire_point' as object_type, fp.fire_point_id as object_id, fp.dept_id, fp.source_dept_id, fp.fire_point_id, null as gateway_id, null as sensor_id, null as extinguisher_id, latest.window_end_time as trigger_time, latest.window_end_time as last_trigger_time, latest.window_start_time, latest.window_end_time, latest.sample_count, 'actual_extinguisher_count < expected_extinguisher_count, consecutive=3' as threshold_snapshot, concat('fire_point=', coalesce(fp.fire_point_name, fp.fire_point_code, fp.fire_point_id), ', snapshots=', latest.samples) as evidence_summary, 'pending' as warning_status from fe_fire_point fp join ( select x.fire_point_id, min(x.snapshot_time) as window_start_time, max(x.snapshot_time) as window_end_time, count(1) as sample_count, sum(case when x.expected_extinguisher_count > 0 and x.actual_extinguisher_count < x.expected_extinguisher_count then 1 else 0 end) as abnormal_count, group_concat(concat(x.actual_extinguisher_count, '/', x.expected_extinguisher_count, ' @ ', date_format(x.snapshot_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) order by x.snapshot_time separator '; ') as samples from fe_fire_point_device_snapshot x where x.snapshot_time is not null and ( select count(1) from fe_fire_point_device_snapshot y where y.fire_point_id = x.fire_point_id and y.snapshot_time is not null and (y.snapshot_time > x.snapshot_time or (y.snapshot_time = x.snapshot_time and y.snapshot_id > x.snapshot_id)) ) < 3 group by x.fire_point_id having sample_count = 3 and abnormal_count = 3 ) latest on latest.fire_point_id = fp.fire_point_id where (fp.del_flag is null or fp.del_flag = '0') and fp.source_dept_id = #{sourceDeptId}

select 'extinguisher_expired' as warning_type, 'extinguisher' as object_type, e.extinguisher_id as object_id, e.dept_id, e.source_dept_id, e.fire_point_id, s.gateway_id, e.sensor_id, e.extinguisher_id, now() as trigger_time, now() as last_trigger_time, e.expiry_date as window_start_time, e.expiry_date as window_end_time, 1 as sample_count, 'expiry_date <= current_date' as threshold_snapshot, concat('extinguisher=', coalesce(e.label_code, e.extinguisher_id), ', expiry_date=', date_format(e.expiry_date, '%Y-%m-%d')) as evidence_summary, 'pending' as warning_status from fe_extinguisher e left join fe_sensor s on e.sensor_id = s.sensor_id where (e.del_flag is null or e.del_flag = '0') and e.expiry_date is not null and e.expiry_date <= curdate() and e.source_dept_id = #{sourceDeptId}

select 'abnormal_temperature' as warning_type, 'extinguisher' as object_type, e.extinguisher_id as object_id, e.dept_id, e.source_dept_id, e.fire_point_id, s.gateway_id, e.sensor_id, e.extinguisher_id, max(h.create_time) as trigger_time, max(h.create_time) as last_trigger_time, min(h.create_time) as window_start_time, max(h.create_time) as window_end_time, count(1) as sample_count, concat('temperature outside [', e.temp_lower - 5, ', ', e.temp_upper + 5, '], consecutive=3') as threshold_snapshot, concat('extinguisher=', coalesce(e.label_code, e.extinguisher_id), ', range=', e.temperature_range, ', samples=', group_concat(concat(h.temperature, ' @ ', date_format(h.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) order by h.create_time separator '; ')) as evidence_summary, 'pending' as warning_status from ( select fe.*, cast(substring_index(replace(fe.temperature_range, ' ', ''), '~', 1) as decimal(10,2)) as temp_lower, cast(substring_index(replace(fe.temperature_range, ' ', ''), '~', -1) as decimal(10,2)) as temp_upper from fe_extinguisher fe where (fe.del_flag is null or fe.del_flag = '0') and fe.sensor_id is not null and fe.temperature_range is not null and replace(fe.temperature_range, ' ', '') regexp '^[+-]?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?~[+-]?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' ) e left join fe_sensor s on e.sensor_id = s.sensor_id join fe_sensor_history h on h.sensor_id = e.sensor_id where h.temperature is not null and h.create_time is not null and ( select count(1) from fe_sensor_history y where y.sensor_id = h.sensor_id and y.temperature is not null and y.create_time is not null and (y.create_time > h.create_time or (y.create_time = h.create_time and y.history_id > h.history_id)) ) < 3 and e.source_dept_id = #{sourceDeptId} group by e.extinguisher_id, e.dept_id, e.source_dept_id, e.fire_point_id, s.gateway_id, e.sensor_id, e.label_code, e.temperature_range, e.temp_lower, e.temp_upper having sample_count = 3 and sum(case when h.temperature < e.temp_lower - 5 or h.temperature > e.temp_upper + 5 then 1 else 0 end) = 3
